name: Easy Cheesy Apple Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375 degrees.
2. In a 9-inch pie pan, combine all crust ingredients and mix well. Press crumbs in the bottom and up the sides of the pie pan. Do not press onto the rim.
3. In a large bowl, combine apples and dry pudding mix; spoon into unbaked crust.
4. Sprinkle apples with cheese.
5. In the same bowl, combine remaining ingredients until crumbly; sprinkle them over the cheese.
6. Bake at 375 degrees for 40 - 50 minutes or until light golden brown and apples are tender.
7. Serve warm. Makes 8 servings.
